svg.text: Interested in Artificial Intelligence and Neuroscience.

text.font-family: SF Pro Display, Helvetica Neue, Arial, sans-serif

g.text: PROFILE

text.font-family: SF Pro Text, Helvetica Neue, Arial, sans-serif

g.text: Focused on AI and neuroscience toward the development of AGI.

text.font-family: SF Pro Text, Helvetica Neue, Arial, sans-serif

g.text: Building systems that operate beyond human-scale constraints.

text.font-family: SF Pro Display, Helvetica Neue, Arial, sans-serif

g.text: FOCUS AREAS

text.font-family: SF Pro Text, Helvetica Neue, Arial, sans-serif

g.text: - AI for cybersecurity: autonomous defense beyond human limits.

text.font-family: SF Pro Text, Helvetica Neue, Arial, sans-serif

g.text: - Business solutions: decision intelligence and process automation.

text.font-family: SF Pro Text, Helvetica Neue, Arial, sans-serif

g.text: - Autonomous transport: cars, planes, and marine systems.

text.font-family: SF Pro Text, Helvetica Neue, Arial, sans-serif

g.text: - Social and communication AI: networks, trust, interaction.

text.font-family: SF Pro Text, Helvetica Neue, Arial, sans-serif

g.text: - Virtual reality: adaptive simulation and immersive interfaces.

text.font-family: SF Pro Display, Helvetica Neue, Arial, sans-serif

g.text: PRINCIPLES

text.font-family: SF Pro Text, Helvetica Neue, Arial, sans-serif

g.text: - Security-first design with measurable impact.

text.font-family: SF Pro Text, Helvetica Neue, Arial, sans-serif

g.text: - Scalable systems that remain interpretable and reliable.

text.font-family: SF Pro Text, Helvetica Neue, Arial, sans-serif

g.text: - Human-aligned outcomes in high-stakes environments.

text.font-family: SF Pro Display, Helvetica Neue, Arial, sans-serif

g.text: CURRENT DIRECTIONS

text.font-family: SF Pro Text, Helvetica Neue, Arial, sans-serif

g.text: - AGI-oriented architectures inspired by neural systems.

text.font-family: SF Pro Text, Helvetica Neue, Arial, sans-serif

g.text: - Cybersecurity agents with real-time, autonomous response.

text.font-family: SF Pro Text, Helvetica Neue, Arial, sans-serif

g.text: - Multi-domain automation across enterprise and mobility.

text.font-family: SF Pro Display, Helvetica Neue, Arial, sans-serif

g.text: COLLABORATION

text.font-family: SF Pro Text, Helvetica Neue, Arial, sans-serif

g.text: - Security teams, AI labs, and industry partners.

text.font-family: SF Pro Text, Helvetica Neue, Arial, sans-serif

g.text: - Builders of business AI, autonomy, and VR platforms.

text.font-family: SF Pro Text, Helvetica Neue, Arial, sans-serif

g.text: - Open-source and research communities advancing AGI.
